🌱 AgroVest Platform Launched!
AgroVest is now officially live on agrovest.et. Ethiopia's first agricultural investment earning platform. Join today and start earning daily!

March 2026
💎 AMD5 & AMD6 VIP Plans Available
Premium investment packages now available. AMD5 earns 1,100 Birr/day and AMD6 earns 2,200 Birr/day for 60 days!
INFO
March 2026
🔗 3-Level Referral Commission
Invite friends and earn 10% commission on their recharges. Your downline earns you 2% (Level 2) and 1% (Level 3) automatically!
ℹ️ About AgroVest
☕
AgroVest
Agricultural Investment Platform
🌾 Our Mission
AgroVest connects Ethiopian investors with agricultural opportunities. Our platform enables everyday people to invest in farming and earn consistent daily returns.
📊 Platform Stats
6
Investment Plans
24h
Support Available
3
Referral Levels
🇪🇹
Ethiopia
📞 Contact Us
🌐 Website: agrovest.et
✈️ Telegram: @agrovault
🤖 Support: @agrovaultmanager
Version 1.0 · © 2026 AgroVest. All rights reserved.
❓ Help Center
Frequently Asked Questions
❓ How do I start earning?
Recharge your account (min 1,000 Birr), then activate an investment plan. Each day come back to claim your daily income!
❓ When is my recharge credited?
After you submit a recharge request, our admin team verifies your payment and credits your account within 1–2 hours.
❓ How do referral commissions work?
Share your invite link. When your friend recharges, you earn 10% commission automatically. Level 2 earns 2%, Level 3 earns 1%.
❓ Why can't I withdraw?
You must have an active investment plan. Withdrawals are only Mon–Sat, 10:00AM–6:00PM. Only 1 withdrawal per day is allowed.
❓ What is the withdrawal fee?
A 20% handling fee is deducted from each withdrawal. For example, if you withdraw 1,000 Birr, you receive 800 Birr.
❓ My referral count is wrong?
Go to Task tab and tap the 🔄 Refresh button. Your referral count will update to show the latest number.
📋 Terms & Agreement
☕
AgroVest User Agreement
Please read and accept before registering
1. Platform Overview

AgroVest is a digital agricultural investment platform operating in Ethiopia. By registering, you agree to all terms stated in this agreement.

2. Investment Rules

• Minimum recharge: 1,000 Birr
• Minimum withdrawal: 200 Birr
• Withdrawal fee: 20%
• Daily income must be claimed manually each day
• Investments are non-refundable once activated

3. Working Hours

• Monday – Saturday: 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM
• No withdrawals on Sundays
• Only one withdrawal per day is allowed

4. Account Rules

• One phone number = one account only
• You are responsible for keeping your password safe
• AgroVest is not responsible for lost passwords shared with others

5. Referral Commission

• You earn 50 Birr for each person who registers via your link
• 3-level commission: 10% / 2% / 1% on each recharge
• Commissions are credited automatically

6. Disclaimer

AgroVest reserves the right to suspend accounts that violate platform rules. All investment decisions are made voluntarily by the user.

7. Agreement

By tapping "I Agree & Register" below, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to all terms and conditions of AgroVest.

📋 Employment Contract
☕
AgroVest
1-Year Employment Agreement
📷
Tap to add photo
EMPLOYMENT AGREEMENT
Employee Name: —
Phone Number: —
Employee ID: —
Start Date: —
End Date: —
Terms & Conditions:
1. The employee agrees to work with AgroVest for a period of 1 (one) year from the start date above.
2. The employee will actively promote the AgroVest platform and invite new members.
3. Commission structure: 10% (Level 1) · 5% (Level 2) · 2% (Level 3) on each recharge.
4. The employee agrees to maintain customer privacy and data security.
5. The employee may not share confidential information about the platform.
6. AgroVest reserves the right to terminate employment for rule violations.
7. All earnings must be withdrawn within the platform's working hours (Mon–Sat, 10AM–6PM).
8. This agreement is governed by the laws of the Federal Democratic Republic of Ethiopia.
Employee Signature
AgroVest Management
agrovest.et · @agrovault · © 2026 AgroVest Ethiopia

⬆️ Withdraw Funds
📋 Withdrawal Tips
① Withdrawal requests accepted 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM (Except Sunday)
② Minimum amount: 200 ETB. A handling fee of 20% will be deducted from each transaction
③ Transferring funds may take 2 to 24 hours
④ You must have an active product to withdraw money
⑤ Only one withdrawal request per day is allowed to ensure all requests are processed on time
⑥ Enter your bank information correctly to avoid transaction delays
⑦ If your withdrawal does not reflect within the given time frame, contact your hiring manager to process your withdrawal
Min Deposit
1,000 ₿
Min Withdraw
200 ₿
Fee
20%
Working Days
Mon – Sat
Processing
Within 24 hrs
📋 Company Rules
◉ Minimum deposit: 1,000 Birr
◉ Minimum withdrawal: 200 Birr
◉ Withdrawal fee: 20%
◉ Withdrawal hours: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM
◉ Working days: Monday – Saturday (No Sundays)
◉ Invitation reward: 10% · 2% · 1%
◉ Team commission: 5% · 2% · 1%
◉ Withdrawal processing time: within 24 hours
◉ The company offers both weekly & monthly salaries

👥 All Users
🔗 Referral Commissions
🔥 Firebase Referral Re-Sync
Push ALL existing referral data to Firebase so users can sync their counts
🗑️ Reset All Users Data
Delete ALL registered users so everyone can register fresh with your referral link
⚠️ WARNING: This will delete ALL user accounts, balances, and data. This action cannot be undone. Only use this to start fresh!
💰 Adjust User Balance

Credit or deduct user balance. Enter phone exactly as registered.

🎁 Generate Gift Codes

Generate random codes giving 0–150 Birr. Share them with your users to claim via Cash Gift button.
